scenario.name: NOTIFY UAC (MWI)
scenario.send:
NOTIFY sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:voicemail@[local_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 NOTIFY Event: message-summary Subscription-State: active Contact: <sip:voicemail@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/simple-message-summary Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/siphon-test Content-Length: [len]
Messages-Waiting: yes Message-Account: sip:[service]@[remote_ip] Voice-Message: 2/8 (0/0)
